The data calculated data showed in the Mean ± Standard Error of Mean (SEM). The
ANOVA was applied to use Student’s t-test for the calculation of various mean val-
ues as two statistical unpaired examinations. The all results were found which were
significant statistically as a p-values (< 0.05).
Results and discussion
Characterization of prepared NPs
MNG  PLGA  NPs  and  P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  were  taken  mean  size  of  particles
resulted  96.6 ± 1.98  nm  and  103.4 ± 2.66  nm  respectively.  The  zeta  potential  was
−24.6 ± 1.03  mV  and  −35.8 ± 0.96  mV  and  their  values  of  PDI,  i.e.,  0.136  and
0.201. EE (%) of MNG PLGA NPs was got 72.29 ± 3.77% after the coating of poly-
sorbate-80;  the  %EE  in  P  80  MNG  PLGA  NPs  was  increased  upto  76.08 ± 4.91%
(Table 1, Figs. 1 and 2).
Study of nanoformulation of surface texture
The smooth surface of all the final opt-NPs were found with their spherical shape
by  the  examination  of  SEM  examination.  All  the  formulations  were  dried  by  the
use of Freeze Dryer after that examined their size and ZP of NPs by Zeta Sizer fol-
lowed by SEM used for surface of NPs. We got the spherical shape of NPs for P 80
MNG PLGA NPs and their size of particles < 105 nm after the examination of SEM
